## RuntimeContext.resolveChocolateSpec() method

Resolves a chocolate specification to runtime ingredient objects.

**Signature:**

```typescript
resolveChocolateSpec(spec: IChocolateSpec, confectionId: ConfectionId): IResolvedChocolateSpec;
```
